calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Termination And Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-03-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Elliott appeared by telephone for Petitioners.

The Court stated that the trust named the Trustee, that Bank of America needed to step in or decline, or that a petition for appiointment of a Successor Trustee from either party needed to be filed. The Court denied the petition without prejudice.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR#6213. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. McDaniels.
